channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: AI Solves 80-Year-Old Math Problem That Stumped Experts For Decades

media:content.media:description: OpenAI researchers gave the problem to an advanced AI model.

item.description: OpenAI's AI model solved the famous unit distance problem, a question that had challenged mathematicians since 1946
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's AI model solved the famous unit distance problem, a question that had challenged mathematicians since 1946

item.title: Video: Russian Forces Use Handheld "Yolka" System To Take Down Drone

media:content.media:description: The "Yolka" is designed to shoot down enemy drones midair using impact.

item.description: The system first came into public attention during Russia’s Victory Day parade in May 2025, when a compact device was seen with a security officer near President Vladimir Putin.
item.content:encoded: The system first came into public attention during Russia’s Victory Day parade in May 2025, when a compact device was seen with a security officer near President Vladimir Putin.

item.title: Narrower Than A Fridge, Deadlier Than Thai Caves: Inside Laos Cave Rescue

media:content.media:description: Amid rains, escape routes vanished and the cave became a doomed trap

item.description: The questions outnumbered solutions. Were the miners safe, or even alive? Could they be reached? How would they use regulators, gauges and oxygen tanks, diving equipment they probably would have never seen, let alone used?
item.content:encoded: The questions outnumbered solutions. Were the miners safe, or even alive? Could they be reached? How would they use regulators, gauges and oxygen tanks, diving equipment they probably would have never seen, let alone used?

item.title: What Trump's Latest Health Checkup Says And What He Needs To Work On

media:content.media:description: Doctors conducted a detailed physical and mental health examination.

item.description: The report showed that his health appears better than what is typically expected for someone his age.
item.content:encoded: The report showed that his health appears better than what is typically expected for someone his age.

item.title: Chinese Missile Likely Downed US F-15 Fighter Jet In Iran: Report
item.description: US officials said the equipment could have improved Iran’s ability to track advanced fighter jets like the US F-15E Strike Eagle.
item.content:encoded: US officials said the equipment could have improved Iran’s ability to track advanced fighter jets like the US F-15E Strike Eagle.

item.title: Israel Captures Strategic Castle In Lebanon In Deepest Incursion Since 26 Years

media:content.media:description: Israeli troops have been advancing for days in villages close to Beaufort castle.

item.description: The capture of Beaufort castle near the city of Nabatiyeh came after days of intense fighting and airstrikes in nearby villages where Israeli troops fought Hezbollah members in the rugged area.
item.content:encoded: The capture of Beaufort castle near the city of Nabatiyeh came after days of intense fighting and airstrikes in nearby villages where Israeli troops fought Hezbollah members in the rugged area.

item.title: Horses Bolt Through Rome After Policeman Lights Fireworks At Parade Rehearsal
item.description: Fireworks set off without permission by a traffic policeman during a latenight rehearsal for Italy's Republic Day parade startled dozens of horses, sending them bolting
item.content:encoded: Fireworks set off without permission by a traffic policeman during a latenight rehearsal for Italy's Republic Day parade startled dozens of horses, sending them bolting

item.title: Soaring Prices During Iran War Hit Travel To Tourism-dependent Asian Countries

media:content.media:description: Jet fuel shortages and surging costs have led airlines to cut flights.

item.description: Tourism contributes nearly 13 per cent of gross domestic product in Thailand and nearly nine per cent in Vietnam, and it underpins millions of jobs in Cambodia.
item.content:encoded: Tourism contributes nearly 13 per cent of gross domestic product in Thailand and nearly nine per cent in Vietnam, and it underpins millions of jobs in Cambodia.

item.title: Indian Man In Canada Claims He Wasn't Aware His Friend Was In Lawrence Bishnoi Gang

media:content.media:description: Dalla is allegedly a part of an international criminal syndicate

item.description: Canadian immigration authorities plan to deport Jashandeep Singh over his links to Arshdeep Dalla and a shooting incident last August.
item.content:encoded: Canadian immigration authorities plan to deport Jashandeep Singh over his links to Arshdeep Dalla and a shooting incident last August.

item.title: A 2022 Volcanic Eruption May Hold Clue To Cut Gas Behind Global Warming: Report

media:content.media:description: Researchers estimate that the volcano released about 330,000 tonnes of methane.

item.description: The volcano erupted in January 2022 with a force hundreds of times greater than the Hiroshima nuclear explosion, sending ash, steam and gas nearly 40 miles into the sky
item.content:encoded: The volcano erupted in January 2022 with a force hundreds of times greater than the Hiroshima nuclear explosion, sending ash, steam and gas nearly 40 miles into the sky

item.title: "Pirate Party" Boat Carrying 148 Tourists Sinks In Turkey, Passengers Jump Into Sea
item.description: All 148 people on board were accounted for and brought to safety. There were no reports of fatalities.
item.content:encoded: All 148 people on board were accounted for and brought to safety. There were no reports of fatalities.

item.title: How Pakistan's Social Media Star Shahzad Bhatti Became ISI's New Weapon

media:content.media:description: On Saturday, the Delhi Police Special Cell arrested eight suspects linked to Bhatti's module (File)

item.description: On Saturday, the Delhi Police Special Cell arrested four suspects linked to Shahzad Bhatti's module, who were allegedly planning major attacks across the country.
item.content:encoded: On Saturday, the Delhi Police Special Cell arrested four suspects linked to Shahzad Bhatti's module, who were allegedly planning major attacks across the country.

item.title: 1906 US Fire Reduced 2,00,000 Books To Ashes In Library. 1 Has Now Returned

media:content.media:description: How the book returned remains a mystery to Library Manager Myles Cooper

item.description: Randall Schwed found Echoes of the Foot-Hills listed on an online marketplace for $35.
item.content:encoded: Randall Schwed found Echoes of the Foot-Hills listed on an online marketplace for $35.

item.title: "Very Interesting": Trump Says Iran Has Agreed To No Nuclear Weapons

media:content.media:description: Media outlets reported that Trump had sent back a new framework

item.description: Trump has said his priorities for any deal include stopping Iran from any nuclear weapon development and re-opening the blockaded Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: Trump has said his priorities for any deal include stopping Iran from any nuclear weapon development and re-opening the blockaded Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: After Vietnam, Indonesia To Buy India's Brahmos: What Makes It Special

media:content.media:description: The deal with Vietnam is reportedly worth around Rs 5,800 crore.

item.description: The deal with Vietnam is reportedly worth around Rs 5,800 crore.
item.content:encoded: The deal with Vietnam is reportedly worth around Rs 5,800 crore.

item.title: No Concerts, No Problem: Trump Plans 'Great American State Fair' For US' 250th Anniversary

media:content.media:description: Trump was dismissive of the acts that backed out.

item.description: Trump's social media post twice referenced him holding a rally "Wednesday," without a specific date.
item.content:encoded: Trump's social media post twice referenced him holding a rally "Wednesday," without a specific date.

item.title: US Struck Commercial Ship Trying To Breach Blockade 'After 20 Warnings', Reach Iran

media:content.media:description: With the latest action, US military has stopped six ships trying to breach the blockade.

item.description: The Gambia-flagged cargo ship Lian Star ignored more than 20 warnings from US forces overnight as it tried to enter an Iranian port.
item.content:encoded: The Gambia-flagged cargo ship Lian Star ignored more than 20 warnings from US forces overnight as it tried to enter an Iranian port.

item.title: US Says Capable Of Resuming War With Iran As Deal Remains Elusive

media:content.media:description: Despite a ceasefire that has largely held since April, there have been occasional flare-ups.

item.description: The United States warned on Saturday it was "more than capable" of resuming its war with Iran after President Donald Trump said any peace deal must adhere to his red lines, including Tehran...
item.content:encoded: The United States warned on Saturday it was "more than capable" of resuming its war with Iran after President Donald Trump said any peace deal must adhere to his red lines, including Tehran...

item.title: Sue Tilley Met Lucian Freud In 1990s. Her Nude Painting Could Now Fetch $47 Million

media:content.media:description: Sue Tilley hasn't seen any of the millions that the portraits have fetched at auction.

item.description: Lucian Freud, a grandson of psychoanalyst Sigmund Freud, is famed for fleshy nudes of friends, family and the artist himself.
item.content:encoded: Lucian Freud, a grandson of psychoanalyst Sigmund Freud, is famed for fleshy nudes of friends, family and the artist himself.

item.title: Video: Meteor Explodes Over US With Force Equal To 300 Tonnes Of TNT, NASA Confirms

media:content.media:description: NASA said it was a "natural object".

item.description: According to the United States Geological Survey (USGS), it was a "widely felt sonic boom from a suspected bolide".
item.content:encoded: According to the United States Geological Survey (USGS), it was a "widely felt sonic boom from a suspected bolide".
